what_it_does: Records metadata for a design-source image asset named pitch-deck/p-03, acting as a ledger entry that maps a logical image address to a blob and declares it as source design ground-truth.
observations: YAML frontmatter contains asset metadata including id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, dimensions, source, author_session, created, and links.
Image dimensions are recorded as w: 0 and h: 0.
Body text states 'SOURCE design ground-truth — pitch-deck/p-03.jpg'.
standouts: Width and height are both zero despite being an image ledger entry.
The asset is explicitly labeled as 'SOURCE design ground-truth'.
The blob URI uses a b2: prefix.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a fixed set of metadata fields.
References binary content via a blob://b2:<hash> URI.
Includes a human-readable body line identifying the source file.
concerns: Zero width and height may indicate missing or uncomputed image dimensions.
Empty links array means no relationships are recorded for this asset.
No provenance or version information beyond author_session and created timestamp.
notes: This is a ledger stub for a pitch-deck image asset that links a logical address to a JPEG blob and marks it as design ground-truth.
questions: Why are the image dimensions zero?
What does the b2: prefix in the blob URI signify?
Is the body line intended to be machine-readable or only human-readable?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record a design-source image ground-truth, and the file does provide a metadata record linking to the image blob; however, the zero dimensions suggest the record may be incomplete.
intention_signals: To create a stable, referenceable ledger entry for a pitch-deck image so it can be located, attributed, and treated as authoritative design source material.
contribution: Provides a canonical metadata record that maps the logical image address image://design-source/pitch-deck/p-03 to a specific JPEG blob, author, and creation timestamp, enabling retrieval and attribution of the pitch-deck page asset.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger entry for a design-source JPEG image named pitch-deck/p-03 that maps a logical address to a b2 blob and labels it as source design ground-truth.
intention_for_embedding: To register and preserve a pitch-deck image asset as authoritative design source material with retrievable metadata.
